title: Woman's Athletic Club of Chicago ransomware incident

extortion.description: Woman's Athletic Club of Chicago is a private women's club residing in a historical landmark building on Michigan Avenue and the country's first women's athletic club.We are ready to upload some essential corporate documents such as: confidential licenses, agreements and contracts, financial data(audits, payment details, reports), internal correspondences, HRdocuments, contact numbers and e-mail addresses of employees andcustomers, etc.
